title: Colour Visualisation Tool
content:

Tile or COLORBOND® steel Roof Paint

Due to colour variations in all browser and monitor types, the displayed colour palettes are a representation only of the actual colour. Call us 0448 812 800 to discuss what you need. 

We use industry leading roof coatings made from the highest quality materials. Whether your roof is tiled or COLORBOND® steel we can repaint it and have it looking like new again.

 

Australian Made Roof Coatings

The roof coatings we use are made in Australia and designed to perform under the harshest Australian conditions.

Our roof coatings are made from the best quality resins and colour pigments available today, including raw materials from the world’s largest producer of acrylic emulsions.

Contact Sandhurst Roofing Today

Contact Sandhurst Roofing today on 0448 812 800, to discuss all your roof paint colour needs, we are more than happy to organise a quote for you or answer any questions you may have. Alternatively, you can fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as we can.

For more information on 'the cost of colorbond roof painting' visit our blog, here.
seoTitle: Color Visualisation Tool | Choice Of 42 Colours
seoDescription: Colour Visualisation Tool. See what your roof looks like. 42 colours to choose from. You can also select gutter colours, fascias and walls.
